title: docs/podman.1: clarify effective storage driver options
body:
Use of the `podman --root` option unexpectedly cleared the default storage options from the configuration file and environment variable. Make sure to document this behavior with the `--storage-opt` option. This behavior changed in commit 55f00bac02fc ("Clear the storage-options from the graphdriver if users specifies --root", v3.3.0).

Fix `--root` and `--storage-driver` docs, there is no `storage-opt` setting in `containers-storage.conf(5)`. Use `storage.options.<driver>` instead of `storage.options.*` to avoid implying that `storage.options.pull_options` would also be ignored.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

<!--
Write `None` if there are no user-facing changes, otherwise enter your release note below.
Include "action required" if users need to take action when upgrading.
-->

```release-note
None.
```

comments.body:
Noticed this issue while trying to reduce journald spam due to unsupported overlay options in rootless mode, using `--root` to experiment with tmpfs storage.
```
$ podman --root=/tmp/proot --events-backend=none run --log-driver=none quay.io/podman/hello
Trying to pull quay.io/podman/hello:latest...
...
!... Hello Podman World ...!
...
```

Observed `kernel: overlayfs:` messages:
```
systemd[2541]: Started podman-5909.scope.
kernel: overlayfs: upper fs does not support file handles, falling back to index=off.
kernel: overlayfs: fs on '/tmp/proot/overlay/2114fc8b70586b9325dde6fd26066d9951414dcdfb3995f41d51d1995cf3bd9d/diff' does not support file handles, falling back to xino=off.
kernel: tun: Universal TUN/TAP device driver, 1.6
systemd[2541]: Started libpod-conmon-3b166fb19b3d7ae8f335fd8db18837c88e2c8657283d87a5d2cd415618e8758d.scope.
systemd[2541]: Started libcrun container.
```

Tried to override mount options with a config file or environment variable, no effect:
```
$ STORAGE_OPTS=mountopt=nodev,index=off,xino=off \
    podman --root=/tmp/proot info -f '{{.Store.GraphOptions|json}}'
{}

$ mkdir -p ~/.config/containers/storage.conf.d
$ printf '%s\n' > ~/.config/containers/storage.conf.d/overlay-nospam.conf \
    '[storage.options.overlay]' 'mountopt = "nodev,index=off,xino=off"'
$ podman info -f '{{.Store.GraphOptions|json}}'
{"overlay.mountopt":"nodev,index=off,xino=off"}
$ podman --root=/tmp/proot info -f '{{.Store.GraphOptions|json}}'
{}
```

Only the `--storage-opt` driver option works:
```
$ podman --storage-opt mountopt=nodev,index=off,xino=off \
    --root=/tmp/proot info -f '{{.Store.GraphOptions|json}}'
{"mountopt":"nodev,index=off,xino=off"}
```

Side note: `STORAGE_OPTS` always splits on a comma, and does not support setting multiple options:
```
$ STORAGE_OPTS=mountopt=nodev,index=off,xino=off podman info -f '{{.Store.GraphOptions|json}}'
Error: configure storage: unknown option "index" ("index=off")
```

This PR is suitable for backporting to the v6.0 branch, no merge conflicts.

CC @rhatdan
Resolved review comments. Rebased and additionally changed some wording for conciseness (Overriding -> Setting, dropped "will [be]").
[NON-BLOCKING] Packit jobs failed. @containers/packit-build please check. Everyone else, feel free to ignore.
